title: ATHENSHOT Festival — Abundance
excerpt: The performance «Abundance» is presented at the ATHENSHOT Festival, Saturday July 4 at 19:00. The festival gathers artists, creators and the public in a celebration of contemporary art, photography and performance.

title: Melenikou Arts Festival 2026 — Bodies in Suspension
excerpt: Participation in the Melenikou Arts Festival 2026 (3rd Year) with 8 Performance Art Works over three evenings. Calibra Votanikos & Cube Noir Votanikos, 19–21 June | 20:30.

title: Athens Open Art
excerpt: Group exhibition at the Michael Cacoyannis Foundation, Athens. Contemporary visual arts (painting, sculpture, photography and video art). Open daily 18:00–22:00.

title: Perasmata II
excerpt: PERASMATA II invites the public to an all-night live performance event unfolding throughout the historic Bageion Hotel.

title: Earth Body
excerpt: Calibra and Cube Noir present the EARTH BODY exhibition, an artistic project exploring the relationship between the human being and the body as material and space.

title: First selection — Arte Laguna Prize 2025
excerpt: The performance work «Abundance» was selected in the First Selection phase of the 20th edition of the Arte Laguna Prize, an internationally recognised contemporary art institution based in Venice.
